parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the customer (UUID | MAX 36; MIN 36).

merchant_customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer in the external merchant (MAX 255; MIN 3).

merchant_customer_created_at.description: Customer´s registration date on the merchants platform (ISO 8601 MAX 27; MIN 27)

date_of_birth.description: The customer's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (MAX 10; MIN 10).

document.description: Specifies the customer's document object, including its number and type.

document_type.description: The customer's document type (MAX 6, MIN 3; [Country reference](country-reference)).

phone.description: Specifies the customer's phone number object.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the customer's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Possible values values: Check the [Country reference.](country-reference)

number.description: The customer's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

billing_address.description: Specifies the customer's billing address object.

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: The country considered for the billing address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)).

state.description: The state considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the billing address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood of the address line of the customer(MAX 255; MIN 1).

shipping_address.description: Specifies the customer's shipping address object.

address_line_1.description: The primary shipping address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

address_line_2.description: The secondary shipping address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the shipping address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: The country considered for the shipping address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)).

state.description: The state considered for the shipping address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the shipping address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood of the address line of the customer(MAX 255; MIN 1).

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.

messages: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.
